policy: Candidates are discovery leads. Promote a source to external-training-sources.json enabled=true only after dry-run shows useful training/correction material with low noise.

priority_sources.name: Badminton Insight
priority_sources.reason: High coaching density and repeatable tutorial output.

priority_sources.name: Shuttle Smash
priority_sources.reason: Useful article archive; currently monitored with low maxItems.

priority_sources.name: Tobias Wadenka
priority_sources.reason: Coach-led drills and game-based training; handled through youtube-sources.json.

priority_sources.name: Shuttle Life
priority_sources.reason: Large practical tutorial archive; handled through youtube-sources.json.

priority_sources.name: Badminton Famly
priority_sources.reason: Useful tactics and technique archive; mixed with community/commercial content.

trial_sources.name: Paul Stewart Badminton Coach
trial_sources.reason: Latest feed items did not pass training keyword filter. Keep for periodic manual review.

trial_sources.name: Badminton Centre Blog
trial_sources.reason: Dry-run returned motivational/nutrition/basic material; not enough correction density.

trial_sources.name: Altitude Badminton Blog
trial_sources.reason: Dry-run returned journey/basic material; keep known high-value pages as seeds.

trial_sources.name: Diemo Ruhnow Badminton Training
trial_sources.reason: High-value technique archive; use as a seed page, not a high-frequency source.

trial_sources.name: Western Badminton footwork article
trial_sources.reason: Practical drill content; one-time extraction candidate.

chinese_platforms.name: 爱羽客
chinese_platforms.reason: Use search result URLs first; promote pages after readability check.

chinese_platforms.name: 中羽在线 / 中羽网
chinese_platforms.reason: Forum and article material needs noise filtering; useful for tactics and equipment-neutral discussions.

chinese_platforms.name: 知乎
chinese_platforms.reason: Question/answer quality varies; extract only concrete training methods and coach reasoning.

chinese_platforms.name: 小红书 / 抖音 / 快手 / 优酷
chinese_platforms.reason: Use as lead discovery. Do not treat search snippets as training truth; video/manual review required.
